text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A few days have passed since the tryouts, where Grass Wonder
demonstrated her impressive physical and mental skills.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Ever since then, trainers have been lining up to speak with her.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Even today as I walk down the boulevard, I see them approaching her
again.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Thank you for the sincere remarks, but I must apologize... I will have
to decline your offer.

text_block_list.name: Veteran Trainer A
text_block_list.text:
B-but why?! If there's a problem with my methods, you can tell me! I'll
do anything to fix it!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
I am pleased to hear such generous words. However... my mind
remains unchanged.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: I will not be accepting any offers from trainers right now.

text_block_list.name: Veteran Trainer A
text_block_list.text: I see... That's a real shame, but I hear you.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Shoulders slumped in defeat, the veteran trainer retreats from view.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Hm? Ah, it's you...

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Might you have come to scout me as well?
choice_data_list: No, I know you wouldn't accept.
No, I know you wouldn't accept.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Yes... I'm sorry about that.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
But please, don't misunderstand. It's not that I see some fault within
you.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: The problem lies solely within me.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: That's right. Now... if you'll excuse me, I'll be on my way.

text_block_list.name: Veteran Trainer A
text_block_list.text:
Grass Wonder... What a pity. That problem she mentioned—I'm sure
it's because she isn't cut out for competition.

text_block_list.name: New Trainer A
text_block_list.text:
Oh, because she's so calm and laid-back that she lacks the drive to
debut and compete with others?

text_block_list.name: New Trainer A
text_block_list.text:
Geez, I guess if she herself doesn't care about winning, there's not
much we can do...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It wasn't long until other trainers began whispering the same thing
around school...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Some days later, I see Grass Wonder and El Condor Pasa running
together.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Pheeew... It was really simpatico of you to run with me, Grass! I think
I've about finished.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: I see. It was nice spending time with you. I'll keep running a bit more.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: I wish to improve my stamina with a little more training.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Huh? Why stamina? I didn't think you had any big issues in that area...

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Oh, far from it... I still have quite a ways to go.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
One more step... When my stamina is all but gone on the final stretch,
I need to be able to push one more step forward.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Huuuuuh...

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: What is it, El?

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Nothing much... Just, you really don't want to accept any scouting
offers?

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Ah, that... Haha, oh, El. How many times have you brought that up?

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
As you seem to forget so often, shall I write it on your forehead? "I
decline."

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
H-h-hey, gimme a break, por favor! And would you leave my forehead
outta this?!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Very well. But that's the truth of it. This discussion is over.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Hmmmm?

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
...You know what's funny though? The trainers are saying that you're
not a competitive person.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
They say you don't accept any offers 'cause you lack fighting spirit...
That your calm and gentle nature isn't good for racing!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Hilarious! Hahaha! Maaan, it's amazing how much they don't get you!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Because the Grass I know—

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
El? If you've the spirit to speak this much, I think you can accompany
me a while longer, don't you agree?

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Ah, I know. How about some stretching? Here, let me help. Ready
and streeeeetch...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Eep?!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
I-I'm really leaving this time! If I stay any longer, I feel like I might get
my joints twisted in ways that'll make a Romero Special look tame!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Adiooos!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: That El sure is something.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: ...Now, back to stamina training.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: I will not...

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: I will not relent a second time.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Grass Wonder's expression was calm as ever as she spoke to herself,
but...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The light in her eyes seemed to burst with a fiery blue glow.
